title: carex praeox var. refracta
intro: Carex praeox var. refracta, also known as the Rock Sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the Rock Sedge has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Rock Sedge can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
